site.name: Muhammad Mustakeem
site.title: Senior Unity Developer | AR/VR & 3D Game Specialist
site.intro: Senior Unity Developer specializing in AR/VR simulations, multiplayer systems, and high-performance 3D games.
site.about: I am a Unity developer with 4+ years of experience building production-ready games and simulations. My focus is AR/VR application development, multiplayer architecture, and aggressive performance optimization for mobile and standalone VR headsets. I have shipped mobile games with 500K+ total downloads and consistently deliver stable, scalable systems for both consumer and enterprise products.

seo.description: Muhammad Mustakeem is a Senior Unity Developer delivering AR/VR simulations, multiplayer systems, and high-performance 3D games for studios and enterprise clients.
seo.keywords: Unity developer, AR VR developer, multiplayer game developer, Photon, Netcode, Quest 2 optimization, Islamabad

services.title: Unity Game Development
services.description: End-to-end Unity 3D game development from prototype to production release across mobile, PC, and standalone VR.

services.title: AR/VR Application Development
services.description: Immersive AR/VR applications with intuitive interactions, optimized rendering, and deployment for Oculus and OpenXR devices.

services.title: Multiplayer Game Systems
services.description: Real-time multiplayer architecture using Photon and Unity Netcode with synchronization, lobby systems, and low-latency gameplay.

services.title: Mobile Game Optimization
services.description: Performance tuning for stable frame rates, reduced memory usage, and improved battery efficiency on Android/iOS.

services.title: VR Training Simulations
services.description: Enterprise-grade VR training simulations for aviation, warehouse, and operations use cases with measurable outcomes.

services.title: Game Prototyping
services.description: Rapid prototyping to validate mechanics, user experience, and technical feasibility before full production investment.

experience.description: Developed VR training simulations for aviation and warehouse industries, implemented multiplayer collaboration with Photon, and optimized rendering to achieve 90 FPS on Quest 2.
Built WebXR gallery systems and ARCore marker-tracking experiences for interactive product visualization.
Published multiple mobile games with Unity Ads monetization and implemented multiplayer game systems for indie products.

achievements.description: Total mobile game downloads across shipped titles.
Average user ratings across published game releases.
Retention improvement through multiplayer feature integration.
VR performance gain through optimization and profiling workflows.
Delivered VR training solutions for real operational use cases.

testimonials.quote: Muhammad delivered polished gameplay systems with excellent optimization. The project quality exceeded our expectations.
testimonials.author: Studio Client

testimonials.quote: His VR simulation work was technically strong and practical for real training scenarios. Great problem-solving under deadlines.
testimonials.author: Enterprise Client

testimonials.quote: Clear communication, reliable delivery, and strong Unity expertise throughout development.
testimonials.author: Freelance Client

contact.message: Available for freelance Unity development, VR simulation contracts, and full-time opportunities.

projects.description: Sorting-based mobile puzzle experience focused on lightweight runtime performance and smooth UX.

projects.description: Action shooter gameplay implementation with weapon feedback, responsive controls, and mission progression.

projects.title: CarStunt
projects.description: Arcade driving game featuring stunt mechanics, responsive vehicle controls, and optimized physics behavior.

projects.title: KnockDown VR Training Simulator
projects.description: Interactive VR training module with real-world process simulation and measurable user performance tracking.

projects.title: Hotel Room Visualization VR
projects.description: Photorealistic VR walkthrough experience for hospitality visualization and client presentation workflows.

projects.description: Aviation-focused VR training simulator for marshaling procedures with guided instruction and error feedback.
